Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We are given a process tree model and asked to find a trace that the model accepts but that is invalid according to the domain knowledge of Order to Cash

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The root is a sequence of four children 1 receive_order 2 check_inventory 3 xor_node 4 close_order

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The xor_node is an XOR choice between two subtrees successful_subtree a parallel composition of three activities authorize_payment package_items ship_order cancel_subtree a sequence of two activities cancel_order then close_order

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Now note that the root sequence already has a close_order as the last step However the cancel_subtree also ends with a close_order

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: This means that if the cancel branch is taken we will have two close_order activities one from the cancel_subtree and one from the root sequence

Name: Validation - PE
Text: If we take the cancel_subtree the cancel_subtree is sequence cancel_order close_order Then the root sequence continues with the close_order that is the fourth child of the root So indeed we get two close_order activities at the end

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So if we take the cancel branch the trace would be Receive_Order Check_Inventory Cancel_Order Close_Order Close_Order

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The domain knowledge says that in the insufficient inventory case we cancel the order and then close the order It does not say we close the order twice So having two close_order activities is problematic

Name: Pattern Recognition - IND
Text: Another issue the successful_subtree is in parallel This means that these three activities can occur in any order

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: The domain might require that authorize_payment happens before package_items and ship_order

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: However the problem asks for a specific trace We can choose either I will choose the cancel branch trace because it is very clear that two close_order activities are not acceptable

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Trace Receive_Order Check_Inventory Cancel_Order Close_Order Close_Order

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: In the domain after checking inventory and finding it insufficient we cancel the order and then close the order We do not close the order twice The order should be closed only once
